The doorway is framed with white trim. Inside, a large circular mirror and a small colorful framed painting are mounted on the far wall above a towel ring with a white towel; a small rug lies on the floor beneath. To the right inside the doorway is open shelving stacked with folded linens and other items. Scene contains moderate clutter and visible reconstruction artifacts in the mirror area."
